_doc: Known-issues feed for the AI CLI Agents plugin diagnostics surface (R-08, Feature #1371).
MAINTENANCE: this file is published via the storefront repo (https://github.com/johnpwhite/unraid-plg-aicliagents)
and fetched by installed plugins from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/johnpwhite/unraid-plg-aicliagents/main/src/known-issues.json
ONLY when the user clicks 'Check known issues' in the Debug Console (never automatically; 24h client cache).
signature_regex   — PCRE body (no delimiters), case-insensitive, matched server-side against the
last 500 REDACTED debug+lifecycle log lines on the user's box
affected_versions — ['*'] for all, or a list of exact versions / version prefixes (YYYY.MM.DD…)
fixed_in          — plugin version carrying the fix, or '' if unfixed
forum_url         — Unraid forum thread (or post) for the issue

issues.title: Unraid 7.3.0 WebGUI 'codeAZ' ReferenceError floods the plugin debug log
issues.workaround: This is an upstream Unraid 7.3.0 regression in the minified webGui dynamix.js bundle, not a plugin defect. Update the plugin to 2026.05.13.08 or later — that release filters webGui-sourced errors out of the plugin debug log (full detail still reaches the browser console). The error itself is harmless to plugin functionality.
